response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software developer with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, performance architecture, and hardware-software co-design. The resume shows no GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture work, no deep neural network optimization, no SoC modeling, and no relevant advanced degree. The skill gap for a Principal Performance Architect position is substantial.
strengths: Long tenure with strong software craftsmanship and TDD discipline
Some low-level C/C++ and DLang experience including National Instruments embedded work
Demonstrated ability to learn diverse stacks and tackle performance-sensitive systems
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator, or hardware architecture experience
No GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or deep learning workload optimization background
Bachelor's in CS with primarily application-layer experience, not meeting the principal hardware-architect bar

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No GPU / SIMD / deep learning optimization background
